{{Infobox artifact
| name = Soulforge
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Soulforge Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Soulforge is a premier, high-tier location used for advanced [[Soulsmithing]]. It exists as an isolated pocket world accessible via a gateway, characterized by a rune-carved stone platform that forms a [[script-circle]] and a surrounding [[void]] filled with shimmering, star-like points of power. At the center of this space sits a silver altar or anvil that serves as the focal point for creative energy, featuring blue [[soulfire]] at its heart. Unlike traditional forging that relies on heat to soften metal, this process involves using tools like hammers to inject a creator's will and authority into an object. The Soulforge is considered an ultimate tool because it allows a smith to imbue items with the willpower and authority of much greater beings, such as [[Monarchs]], which is a level of craftsmanship far exceeding standard [[Archlord]] artifacts. The environment within the forge can react to the work being performed, manifesting phenomena such as wind, clouds, and lightning. It is a highly specialized facility that can be used to create complex constructs, weapons, or even the heart of an isolated world.}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Designed and created by [[Reigan Shen]], the Soulforge is a portable, mobile location that exists as a starry world. This ultimate [[Soulsmithing]] tool features an altar-like anvil containing blue [[soulfire]] and is used to manufacture [[Monarch]] weapons. Associated with the [[Soulsmith inheritance]] of [[Ozmanthus]], the site can increase the level of existence for any projects worked there by using objects fueled by willpower or embedded authority. [[Lindon]] eventually accessed this universally compatible realm through the use of a portal.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">11</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Soulforge]] is a place where [[Monarch]] weapons are made.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Soulforge]] is the ultimate [[Soulsmithing]] tool.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Soulforge]] is a portable location that can increase the level of existence of projects worked there.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Soulforge]] was designed and created by [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Soulforge]] contains an altar-like anvil with a blue flame inside.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Soulforge]] uses objects with embedded authority or willpower to fuel its effects.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Soulforge]] is a portable location that is universally compatible and mobile.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Soulforge]] is associated with [[Ozmanthus]]' [[Soulsmith inheritance]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] used a portal to the [[Soulforge]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Soulforge]] is a starry world.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Soulforge]] contains blue [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Soulforge]] has a platform made of large stone wedges.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The wedges of the [[Soulforge platform]] are marked with symbols that form a [[script-circle]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Soulforge]] contains blue [[soulfire]] at its heart used to bind constructs.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Soulforge serves as a portal containing a gateway to another space. At its heart lies an anvil, and the location functions as an isolated world that acts as a place of separation. [[Lindon]] enters this realm to begin his work, eventually returning to the Soulforge later to make weapons.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Soulforge]] contains a gateway to another space.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2">''Waybound'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Soulforge]] has an anvil at its heart.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Soulforge]] is a portal.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] enters the [[Soulforge]] to begin his work.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Soulforge]] is a place of separation.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Soulforge]] is a place [[Lindon]] can enter.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21">''Waybound'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Soulforge]] is an isolated world.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] returned to the [[Soulforge]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Soulforge]] is a place where [[Lindon]] makes weapons.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c34">''Waybound'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
